name: Week 3 KB Conditioning (Refine & Drill)
description: Thursday = refine Tuesday's new stuff + keep your favorites. Drill bent press and cossack squat from Tuesday. Keep overhead lunges and Simba lift at heavier weights (you earned the bump). Finisher complex stays — it's a real workout, not just practice.

exercises.notes: Easy swings to prime the hinge
Drill from Tuesday. Same light weight (18lb). Focus on the path — your body moves down and around the bell. If Tuesday felt ok, try to go slightly deeper.
Drill from Tuesday. KB goblet hold. Push for deeper range than Tuesday. Heels down, chest up.
W2 you did these at 50lb and they were fine. Stay at 50 or try alternating arms each set. Lock out overhead, torso upright.
Simba lift — W2 was 18lb (too easy). Bump to 25lb or 35lb. If 50lb is the max, add a 2-3 second hold at the top with arms locked.
Your comfort move. Light bell. Keep it in the rotation — it's the perfect active rest between the harder stuff.
50lb. Stay at 50, flex reps based on feel. If you get 5 each, great. If you get 4, that's fine too.
50lb. Squat to press, one fluid motion.

tips: Thursday = refine Tuesday's new moves + heavier favorites
Bent press: still light (18lb). You need at least 2-3 weeks before going heavier on this one.
Simba lift: bump the weight. 18lb was too easy. 25-35lb range, or add the pause hold at top.
Windmill is your palate cleanser — light, familiar, keeps shoulders healthy between the harder stuff
Complex: 50lb for everything. Flex reps on clean & press if needed.
Total time ~30 min — longer than W2 because you added windmill to the favorites block
